description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden wheeled carriage. The cannon barrel is metallic with a blue-tinted finish and features decorative ridges and a slightly flared muzzle. The carriage is constructed from dark, weathered wood, reinforced with metal brackets, and has four solid wooden wheels with metal rims. The cannon is secured to the carriage with visible side trunnions and bolts, and the rear of the carriage is inscribed with the words 'ICE QUEEN.' The overall design is robust, with the cannon barrel dominating the length of the vehicle and the carriage providing stability and mobility. The object appears aged, with visible wear and patina on both the metal and wood surfaces.
description: A blue-metallic cannon mounted on a weathered wooden wheeled carriage, featuring metal reinforcements and the inscription 'ICE QUEEN' on the rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the blue cannon barrel and the symmetrical wooden carriage with metal brackets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, the wooden carriage, and two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carriage, the 'ICE QUEEN' inscription, and the end of the cannon barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cannon barrel, carriage, and two wheels, with visible trunnion and mounting details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the wooden carriage.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; the carriage and barrel are exposed with no additional armor plating.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the object has a solid blue metallic barrel and dark brown wooden carriage.
attribute_military_markings: The inscription 'ICE QUEEN' is visible on the rear of the carriage in block letters.
attribute_tire_type: Not applicable; the vehicle uses four solid wooden wheels with metal rims.
